Descending from storm clouds, light-tendril wings blazing wide, flaming sword drawn overhead in both hands
Thrusting a spear of pure light through a demon's chest, radiance exploding outward in searing waves
Hovering above battlefield, arms outstretched wide, holy light cascading down like golden rain on wounded allies
Pulling ornate hood back to reveal her face, eyes blazing with white-hot divine fire
Catching falling mortal mid-air, one arm around them, luminous wings flaring backward for balance
Planting divine banner into scorched earth, explosion of light erupting upward from impact point
Kneeling to touch charred ground, holy energy spreading outward in concentric golden waves
Deflecting dark spell with raised shield, celestial runes flaring white-hot across its surface
Drawing flaming sword from stone altar, radiant energy climbing rapidly up the blade
Unfurling light-tendril wings to full span on cathedral rooftop, silhouetted against rising sun
Diving vertically downward, both wings tucked tight, sword pointed ahead like a missile
Spinning horizontally mid-flight, wing tendrils whipping outward, slicing through multiple shadow creatures
Slamming her fist into ground, shockwave of holy fire radiating out in all directions
Blocking overhead strike with crossed bracers, divine light bursting from the clash point
Hurling a javelin of condensed light that leaves a blazing contrail through darkness
Catching enemy blade between her palms, holy energy disintegrating the weapon instantly
Leaping backward while firing three arrows of light simultaneously from a celestial bow
Sweeping her hand across the air, manifesting a wall of luminous shields before fleeing civilians
Grasping a corrupted soul's head, purifying white fire flowing from her fingertips into them
Whirling her spear overhead in a full arc, creating a dome of protective light
Rising from kneeling position, wings erupting outward and upward, shattering shadow tendrils around her
Driving both palms forward, launching a concentrated beam of searing holy energy
Somersaulting through air, slashing downward with twin blades trailing golden light
Grabbing demon's horn mid-charge, twisting its head backward while wings flare for leverage
Channeling light through her sword into the ground, creating erupting pillars around enemies
Tearing open her own chest armor, releasing a blinding nova of contained divine power
Snatching arrow from air inches before her throat, crushing it into glowing fragments
Pressing glowing palm against ancient seal, reactivating wards with cascading runic light
Vaulting over rubble with spear extended, impaling charging creature through its open maw
Clapping hands together overhead, generating a thunderclap of pure radiant force
Dragging sword through stone floor, carving a blazing sigil that ignites into holy flames
Snapping wings forward like whips, tendril-tips piercing through multiple airborne demons
Catching ally's body as they collapse, channeling healing light directly into their wounds
Stomping down onto demon's spine, light erupting from beneath her armored boot
Parrying three strikes in rapid succession, each deflection spraying golden sparks
Ascending rapidly while firing radiant bolts downward from both outstretched palms
Ripping off damaged pauldron and hurling it like a discus, blazing with holy fire
Intercepting creature mid-leap, driving her shield edge-first into its sternum
Stretching one arm skyward, pulling down a pillar of heaven's light onto her position
Wrapping wing tendrils around multiple enemies, then igniting them all in synchronized explosion
Sliding beneath demon's legs, slashing upward through its torso in one fluid motion
Punching through stone wall, arm wreathed in light, to grab enemy on other side
Snapping her fingers, igniting a line of holy fire across the ground toward targets
Backflipping off enemy's chest while kicking off, propelling both combatants in opposite directions
Raising both arms, levitating a dozen weapons around her in orbit of light
Biting down on a sacred relic, eyes flooding with golden power as she channels it
Tackling demon through a stone pillar, armor glowing white-hot from impact and momentum
Hooking enemy's weapon with her blade, then disarming with a violent wing-assisted twist
Breathing out a cone of radiant mist that burns shadows on contact
Yanking spear from fallen foe, immediately spinning to hurl it at approaching reinforcements
